text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While strolling through the park, I<n>catch sight of
Fine Motion playing<n>with some children, and Air
Shakur<n>beside her acting as chaperone.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Three, three... And this ooone's...<n>three too!

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I found another spot that looks<n>like it might
have a four-leaf clover!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Then let's get looking!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What's up, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Break time's over, and we're not<n>done gathering
partner running data.<n>Hurry up and let's get back
to<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Shakur. We won't be much<n>longer! I
couldn't find one last time,<n>so I really want to get
these kids a<n>four-leaf clover today.

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text: Heeey! C'mon already!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oops, sorry! I'm coming!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hold on a—dammit!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, four-leaf clovers are amazing. I<n>can't
believe how tough they are to<n>find!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch... Are you sure it's okay forYour Highness to be looking likehell over a bunch of plants?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And how come you're wasting allyour energy on this stuff? I thought itwas the three-leaf clovers everyone in Ireland loves so much.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's true, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I guess it's because I'm here now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Searching together for something<n>people in this
country really care<n>about means we can all
celebrate<n>when we find it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm in Japan after all! I want to<n>cherish every
minute of my time here,<n>even the time I spend
looking for<n>clovers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, screw it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We should look somewhere with<n>more foot traffic.
You're more likely to<n>find them in patches that get
trampled<n>on when they're sprouting.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Save it. Let's just get this over with.

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text:
Got one! Wow! Hey, come look at<n>this, you two! I
found one!

text_block_list.name: Kids
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa. You may be grumpy, but you<n>sure know
a lot!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch, get off of me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: → H-hey! Who said you could take<n>pictures?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's one more memory to treasure!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah, dammit! That's it, I'm going<n>home!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait a second! It came out really<n>well. I'll
send it to you later, okay?!
